name: Caramel Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare an upside-down toffee-like confection.
2. First Layer: Measure the first three ingredients into a bowl and crumble together well. Press the mixture into an ungreased 8 x 8-inch pan. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes, then cool.
3. Second Layer: Melt the second amount of butter and corn syrup in a heavy saucepan. Measure the sugar into a cup and stir with the gelatin until mixed thoroughly. Add this mixture to the saucepan, stirring to dissolve. Gradually add the condensed milk, stirring until heated through. Bring to a boil for 4 minutes, stirring constantly (be careful as it burns easily). Remove from heat and beat until thickened and glossy. Take short rests while beating. Pour over the first layer and chill overnight.
4. Invert onto plastic wrap. This makes cutting into squares easier.
5. Cut into 25 squares.
